summary: Design and implement the decentralized node incentive ledger so ND-069 has receipts, schema, and automation hooks.

steps.title: Consolidate requirements + existing receipts
steps.notes: Digested queue brief, prior decentralized-node plan, ideas doc, propagation automation, and latest scan receipts to enumerate ledger scope, schema, workflow, and guard requirements.

steps.title: Design ledger schema + governance workflow
steps.notes: Drafted schema + CLI blueprint (tools.autonomy.node_ledger) including JSONL format, hash chaining, governance workflow hooks, and guardrails.

steps.title: Implement ledger + automation receipts
steps.notes: Implemented tools.autonomy.node_ledger CLI with append/show/audit commands, added JSON schema + regression tests, and recorded the first ledger entry under _report/usage/node-incentive-ledger/

checkpoint.description: Ledger CLI + schema live with enforceable receipts and docs so ND-069 exits critic backlog.
